title: dichostylis micheliana
intro: Dichostylis micheliana, also known as Michel's Dichostylis, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is an evergreen shrub native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, valued for its medicinal and health benefits. The plant's leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to their anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Dichostylis micheliana can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and has been used to improve health by reducing pain and inflammation, promoting digestive health, and boosting the immune system.
